name: Casa Bella Pro Cleaning Services
description: Casa Bella Pro brings a meticulous, detail-oriented approach to residential cleaning in Murrieta and the surrounding Temecula Valley. Their team handles everything from routine weekly maintenance to thorough deep cleans, leaving homes spotless and fresh. With strong reviews and a consistent track record in the California Oaks corridor, they're a trusted name for homeowners who want reliable, professional results every visit.

name: The Maids of Murrieta
description: The Maids of Murrieta is a locally-rooted cleaning service operating out of the heart of Old Town Murrieta. Known for their team-based cleaning system, they work efficiently without cutting corners — ideal for busy families and professionals in the Murrieta and Temecula area. Their consistent 5-star reputation speaks to a crew that shows up on time, communicates well, and takes pride in every home they clean.

name: Julie's House Cleaning Services
description: Julie's House Cleaning Services is an owner-operated cleaning business based in Murrieta, built on personal attention and a genuine commitment to leaving every home spotless. Julie handles each job herself or with a small trusted crew, meaning you always know who's coming through your door. Her clients appreciate the consistency, the care she takes with their belongings, and the kind of reliable communication you simply don't get from a franchise.

name: A Touch of Class Cleaning Service
description: A Touch of Class Cleaning Service has built a loyal following in Murrieta by delivering exactly what the name promises — a high-standard clean with a personal touch. Owner-operated and deeply familiar with the neighborhoods they serve, they take the time to understand each home's unique needs. Whether you need a one-time refresh or recurring service, A Touch of Class brings the same care and attention every single visit.

name: Barreras Cleaning Services
description: Barreras Cleaning Services is a family-run operation that has been serving Murrieta households with honesty and hard work. They focus on residential cleaning and take a straightforward, no-fuss approach — show up, do great work, and leave the home better than they found it. Their clients appreciate the reliability and the personal relationship that comes with hiring a small, local team that genuinely cares about the community they work in.

name: HouseCleaning by Christina
description: HouseCleaning by Christina is a solo operator with a well-earned reputation for thoroughness and trustworthiness in the Murrieta area. Christina brings a personal, hands-on approach that larger companies simply can't match — she knows her clients by name and cleans every home as if it were her own. Ideal for homeowners who want to work directly with the person doing the cleaning rather than a rotating crew.

name: Maid Spotless
description: Maid Spotless is a Temecula-based cleaning service known for leaving homes in truly immaculate condition. Their attention to detail goes beyond the basics — think baseboards, ceiling fans, and inside appliances — making them a favorite for deep cleans and move-out situations. Homeowners throughout Temecula's wine country communities and newer developments trust Maid Spotless for regular upkeep and special occasion cleaning alike.

name: Maria's Cleaning Service
description: Maria's Cleaning Service has been a staple in the Temecula community for years, building trust through consistent quality and a warm, professional approach. Maria and her team specialize in residential cleaning and have developed a loyal base of clients in neighborhoods from Redhawk to Harveston. Known for being easy to reach, flexible with scheduling, and thorough in their work, Maria's is a top choice for families looking for a cleaner they can count on week after week.

name: Your Favorite Cleaners
description: With over 200 five-star reviews, Your Favorite Cleaners has earned its name across Temecula and beyond. They serve both residential and commercial clients, bringing the same high-energy professionalism to every job. Their team is prompt, thorough, and friendly — qualities that have kept clients coming back for years. Whether you need a recurring home clean or a full office refresh, Your Favorite Cleaners delivers results that justify the hype.

name: Martha's and Company Cleaning Services
description: Martha's and Company Cleaning Services is a local, independently owned cleaning business serving the Temecula area. Martha and her team bring a warm, professional approach to every home they clean — the kind of personalized service that keeps clients coming back. Whether you need a thorough one-time clean or reliable recurring housekeeping, Martha's is the type of local cleaner that quickly becomes a trusted part of your household routine.

name: Dora's House Cleaning
description: Dora's House Cleaning is a family-owned, women-led cleaning service with over 25 years of experience serving the Menifee area. Founded on the belief that every home deserves the same care and attention regardless of size, Dora and her team bring a warm, personal touch that larger operations simply can't replicate. Their loyal client base — built almost entirely on word-of-mouth and glowing reviews — is a testament to the kind of consistency and trust that only comes from a crew that genuinely takes pride in their work.

name: Feels Better Cleaning Services
description: Feels Better Cleaning Services is a licensed and state-registered LLC right here in Menifee, built around a simple promise: your home should feel better every time they leave. They offer flat-rate pricing based on home size and cleaning type, so there are no surprises at the end of the job — just a clean house and a clear receipt. Whether you need a one-time refresh or ongoing weekly or biweekly service, Feels Better brings a professional, no-nonsense approach that homeowners appreciate.

name: RGD Cleaning Services
description: RGD Cleaning Services has been operating out of Menifee since 2020 and has quickly built a strong reputation across Riverside County. With a BBB A+ rating and a presence on Yelp, Instagram, and TikTok, RGD is run with the kind of transparency and accountability that gives homeowners peace of mind. Founded by Ricardo D. Gonzalez, the business handles both residential and commercial jobs — from routine maintenance to post-construction cleanups — with a team that approaches every property with the same level of care.

name: ZenFresh Cleaning
description: ZenFresh Cleaning is a licensed, insured, and bonded Menifee cleaning service that makes booking and pricing as easy as the clean itself. With flat-rate quotes, 100% online booking, and same-day availability, they cater to busy homeowners who don't have time to chase down estimates. They offer a full menu of services — from standard tidying to deep cleans, Airbnb turnovers, and eco-friendly green cleaning options — and back everything with a satisfaction guarantee.

name: Menifee Tidy Cleaners
description: Menifee Tidy Cleaners has been serving local homes and businesses since 2013, making them one of the more established independent cleaning operations in the area. They offer extended hours seven days a week — including evenings — which makes them a practical choice for homeowners who need flexibility around work and family schedules. Price matching, same-day service, and a customer satisfaction guarantee round out an offering that's kept clients coming back for over a decade.

name: Honest and Reliable House Cleaning
description: Honest and Reliable House Cleaning does exactly what the name suggests — show up consistently, communicate clearly, and leave the home better than they found it. Popular on Nextdoor among Menifee residents, this independently operated cleaning service offers recurring weekly, biweekly, and monthly plans as well as one-time and move-in/move-out cleans. With basic cleanings starting at $99 and a straightforward no-surprises approach, they're a go-to for homeowners who've been burned by unreliable services in the past.

name: 999 Cleaning
description: 999 Cleaning is a locally registered Menifee LLC bringing a thorough, detail-forward approach to residential cleaning. In addition to standard house cleaning, they specialize in tile and grout restoration and window cleaning — services that larger general cleaners often overlook or subcontract out. Active on Yelp and available six days a week with extended evening hours, 999 Cleaning is a solid choice for homeowners looking for a locally rooted team that can handle the whole home, not just the basics.

name: We Maid It SoCal
description: We Maid It SoCal is a BBB-accredited cleaning company operating out of Lake Elsinore with a strong presence in Menifee and the surrounding communities. Founded in 2023, they've moved quickly to build a reputation for reliability — using non-toxic cleaning supplies, background-checking their staff, and backing every job with a 24-hour satisfaction guarantee. From standard residential cleans to move-out services, after-event cleanup, and commercial jobs, they cover a wide range of needs across Southwest Riverside County.

name: Majestic Maids Cleaning
description: Majestic Maids Cleaning is a locally operated residential and vacation rental cleaning service with a coverage area that spans Menifee, Murrieta, Temecula, and beyond. They offer online booking through BookingKoala and cater to both homeowners and short-term rental hosts who need reliable, consistent turnovers between guests. With a professional setup, clear pricing, and a team that knows the neighborhoods they serve, Majestic Maids is a dependable option for anyone in Southwest Riverside County looking for quality cleaning without the franchise price tag.
